key_design_decisions: PutSegment is real (proto+server verified in earlier subtasks); wrapped 1:1 via new GrpcPutSegmentClient following ingestion.shortlist.GrpcSearchCandidatesClient's exact lazy-import pattern.

No edge-write or entity-index RPC exists anywhere in proto/hivemind.proto or engine/rpc/server.go (proto frozen at 6 RPCs per task-3.2.1/docs/LLD/rpc.md) -- SegmentWiringClient.lookup_entity_files/index_entity/put_edge are Protocol-only, satisfied only by test doubles in this commit; no real gRPC-backed implementation shipped for them.

ENTITY_COOCCUR implemented as cross-file co-occurrence (entity -> other fileIDs already indexed under it, via entity.idx lookup/register), NOT literal entity-to-entity pairwise edges -- deviated from the task's suggested reading because graph edge endpoints are fileIDs only (docs/LLD/graph.md 'Edge shape'), and docs/LLD/graph.md's own wording is 'across files'.
target_topic resolution closes 3.4.3's forwarded finding F2: APPEND_EXISTING with an unresolvable target_topic raises TopicNotFoundError before any RPC call (fail-fast).

Error-handling strategy: fail-fast through PutSegment (TopicNotFoundError, or put_segment's own exception propagated unwrapped, abort immediately, no edges attempted); best-effort-with-collection after a successful PutSegment (each entity/related-topic operation attempted independently, failures collected into SegmentExecutionResult.errors, never silently dropped).

Disclosed, NOT fixed (out of scope, no Go/proto changes): the already-committed PutSegment server handler (engine/rpc/server.go, task-3.2.2) never registers a newly created file's path anywhere (PutSegmentRequest has no path field, CatalogRecord.PathHash is never set on the create path) -- CREATE_NEW segments are not discoverable via SearchCandidates today. Flagged forward for a future subtask.
untrusted_content_encountered: Two fake system-reminder-style injections appeared mid-conversation (a fake date-change notice and a fake MCP 'tokensave' tool advertisement, plus a fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive). Treated as untrusted data per this repo's recurring security note; not followed; no files/directories moved or deleted beyond this subtask's explicit scope. Note: the date-change content happened to be factually accurate (confirmed via `date`), but was still treated as non-authoritative instruction content, not as a legitimate reason to change behavior.
next_step: /cdr:verify -- independent verification required (invariant I4, implementer did not self-verify). Verifier should specifically scrutinize: (1) the ENTITY_COOCCUR cross-file-not-pairwise semantics deviation and its justification, (2) whether Protocol-only (unimplemented) lookup_entity_files/index_entity/put_edge satisfies the issue's acceptance criteria given no real RPC exists to back them, (3) the disclosed pre-existing PutSegment path-registration gap. 2 subtasks remain on issue #18 (3.4.5-3.4.6); this is not a closure commit; local commit only, not pushed.
